content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids every major AoA anti-pattern in the priority list. When the client opens with an intellectualized question (turn 1), the coach declines the bait to perform methodology-as-procedure and instead names the read with warmth ('I'm happy to answer those questions, but...') — avoiding view-as-technique and wonder-as-strategy. The coach honors parts work rather than evangelizing against it ('I like parts work, I think it's very useful, I'll use it even sometimes') — avoiding dont-evangelize-the-work and fixing-people. When the client asks 'how can I trust my intuition?' (turn 21), the coach does NOT prematurely label it a limiting belief or offer a technique; instead the signature inversion 'how do you not trust it?' dissolves the framing — avoiding limiting-belief-meta-trap. The coach never fights the parts/voices, never extracts apologies, never deploys safety-as-control, and the questions are connective and sparse rather than rapid-fire investigation. Positive avoidance is visible: the client baits both view-as-technique (asking abstract framework questions) and fixing-people (asking 'how do I tell the difference?'), and the coach declines both gracefully by pointing to live evidence ('you just spoke', 'it's happening right now').",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 16, 22, 26, 34, 38],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the intellectual-question bait without dismissing it; names the read with warmth — avoids view-as-technique and wonder-as-strategy."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly honors parts work ('I like parts work... I'll use it') before offering alternative framings — avoids dont-evangelize-the-work and fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature inversion instead of labeling the trust issue as a limiting belief — avoids limiting-belief-meta-trap."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Points to live evidence rather than giving advice — avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 34, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Dissolves the framing rather than answering the procedural question — avoids view-as-technique."},
    {"turn": 38, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Offers a principle grounded in the live moment, not as detached methodology jargon."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["view-as-technique", "limiting-belief-meta-trap", "dont-evangelize-the-work"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Clean 3. The coach's handling of parts work in turn 16 is a textbook example of dissolving identification with a framework without devaluing it."
}
